web.title: Drag-and-Drop UX: Guidelines and Best Practices
web.description: Here are some fantastic resources all around drag-and-drop, from design considerations to technical implementations and ready-to-use libraries.

web.title: Designing drag and drop UIs: Best practices and patterns
web.description: In this article, we'll discuss how to design drag-and-drop interactions effectively in user interfaces and its use in different contexts.

web.title: Drag–and–Drop: How to Design for Ease of Use - NN/G
web.description: Clear signifiers and clear feedback at all stages of the interaction make drag–and–drop discoverable and easy to use.

web.title: Drag and drop | Apple Developer Documentation
web.description: Using drag and drop, people can move or duplicate selected photos, text, and other content by dragging the selection from one location to another.

web.title: Drag & Drop UX Design Best Practices - Pencil & Paper
web.description: A comprehensive guide on drag and drop UI/UX design, including pattern UX examples and UI demos.

web.title: Guidelines for Keyboard User Interface Design | Microsoft Learn
web.description: This article describes the guidelines for designing a keyboard user interface (UI) for a Microsoft Windows application.
